path: Problem: Return an intersecting value from a 2D legend table based on a row category and a column header
Action: INDEX with two MATCH functions (one for row lookup, one for column lookup)

Observation: Works when the output table is a matrix where rows are keyed by one field (e.g., kms band/category) and columns are keyed by another field (e.g., category code), and both keys can be matched exactly to headers/labels
